rules.rule_text:
title: HTTP traffic over anomalous ports
id: 273651ac-ad12-11ed-afa1-0242ac120002
status: stable
description: Detect HTTP traffic over anomalous ports, TA416 has been observed to
  tunnel SSH traffic through HTTPS over port 22.
author: NTT Security - Axel Olsson
date: '2023-02-15'
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    dest_port:
    - 22
    - 3389
    - 1337
    url|startswith: /
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Legitimate HTTP traffic over weird ports.
level: medium
tags:
- attack.command_and_control
